summary: Contamination and Environmental Liability insurance covering pollution clean-up costs, third-party bodily injury and property damage from environmental incidents. Heavily regulated under UK Environment Act 1995 and EU Environmental Liability Directive.

schemaEntities.description: Environmental risk site entity. Custom: SiteType, ContaminantList, GroundwaterDepth, SoilPermeability, PreviousUse, PhaseIESA_Date, PhaseIIESA_Required, EnvironmentalPermitRef, WasteCarrierLicence, EARegulatedFlag, IEDPermitFlag, NatureDesignation, FloodplainProximity.
118 rules: EA regulated site acceptance, Phase II ESA requirement triggers, IED permit compliance checks, natural designation (SSSI/SAC) proximity rules, contamination severity scoring.

Individual contaminant tracking. Custom: ContaminantCode, CASNumber, ConcentrationLevel, RegulatoryThreshold, MediaAffected, MigrationPathway, RemedialTechnology, CleanUpCostEstimate, LiabilityAllocation.

relationships.note: Multiple contaminants per site -- no GW Cloud multi-contaminant entity pattern
EA regulatory and IED permit rules reference 13 custom site fields

migrationIssues.detail: ContaminantEntity_Env has no GW Cloud equivalent. Multi-contaminant-per-site tracking with CAS numbers and remedial technology requires new entity design.
EA permit and regulated site validation requires EA API lookup. GW Cloud has no native EA integration -- new external service connector required.
Environmental Site Assessment trigger rules based on SiteType and PreviousUse. GW Cloud underwriting rules engine can accommodate but requires full rule rebuild.
SSSI/SAC/Ramsar proximity rules require MAGIC map data integration. No GW Cloud equivalent -- external GIS enrichment service required.
Custom TypeKeys for remedial technology types. GW Cloud extension TypeKeys required -- partial ISO standard equivalence available.

cloudMapping.action: Requires EA API integration in GW Cloud -- new external connector
Generic survey date field -- Phase I/II distinction requires custom extension
New multi-contaminant entity required in GW Cloud -- 4-5 sprint effort
MAGIC map integration for natural designation proximity -- new integration
